prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-GOLDPANKIT-GRN-10PC-BUN Product Type: METAL_DETECTOR Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Kit Gold Rush Prospecting Tools Accessories 10pc - Green Description: The ASR Outdoor 10 piece gold panning kit comes with everything you’ll need to get started on your gold prospecting adventure. This essential gold panning kit is a great gift idea for yourself or other prospectors, whether they are beginners or experienced. The tools included are designed to help you identify, clean and collect valuable gold flakes and minerals out in the field. Inside the kit, we’ve included a prospecting hand trowel that is 50% stronger and more durable than any comparable kit out there; it is an essential tool for your arsenal of gold prospecting and metal detecting equipment. It measures 11” in length with a durable front pointed mouth so you can count on it to dig through dirt, sand, and silt in any weather. It’s made of durable, high quality ABS plastic that won't rust or give off any false positive readings on your metal detector.

The kit also comes with 2 different sizes of gold sifting pans: a 10” and an 8” dual riffle diameter gold panning pan. These gold pans feature dual riffle modern technology and come in (3) different colors of your choosing that will provide high contrast so you can identify your found gold flakes and gems. The included pipette droppers will assist with grabbing the smallest of gold flakes and washing them off for inspection. Additionally, we’ve added in a black sand magnetic separator tool that will aid you is removing any magnetite rich particles in your pan quickly and efficiently so you can run more gold rich material through your wash pan. There’s also a set of tweezers with a 4x magnifying glass so you can inspect your flakes and minerals more closely. (3) small glass collection vials allow to store your findings and keep them secured. Each glass vial has a capacity of 3mL (.75 drams) and comes with a water tight plastic screw lid.

Gold prospecting is also a fun activity for kids that encourages outdoor activity and exercise, while learning about metal detecting. Search Terms: beginner gold panning kit equipment tools for adults prospecting gold pans sand scoop metal detecting shovel accessories digging tools pouch kit camping accessories gear gold rush paydirt bags Features: - PROSPECTING GOLD PANNING EQUIPMENT: This 10 piece gold panning kit is a great beginner kit that includes tools designed to help you identify, clean, and collect valuable gold flakes and minerals from your pay dirt out in the field. Everything you'll need to get started on your gold prospecting adventure - PAY DIRT PROSPECTORS TROWEL: This small hand trowel digger is an essential mining tool for your arsenal of gold prospecting and metal detecting equipment. It measures 11" in length with a beveled scoop edge so you can count on it to dig through dirt, sand, and silt in any weather. It's made of durable, high-quality ABS plastic that won't rust - DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PANS: Gold panning kit also comes with 2 different dual riffle gold sifting pans; a 10" and an 8" diameter pan. These gold panning pans feature dual riffles and come in a 3 different colors that will provide high contrast so you can identify gold flakes and gems easily. - BLACK SAND MAGNET: Easily separate black sand from your gold pan with the prospectors 8lb magnet separator that works by squeezing the handle over magnetic particles to pick them out. There's also a tweezer with a 4x magnifying glass so you can inspect your flakes and minerals more closely - FINE GOLD RECOVERY EQUIPMENT: The included water suction tweezerss will assist with grabbing small flakes from the bottom of the pan easily and we've added 3 gold flake vials so you can store your findings and keep them secured. Each glass vial has a capacity of 3mL (.75 drams) and comes with a water-tight plastic screw lid === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
